calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-31-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-31-2005 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Kathy Kollehner.
David Mendez, Esq. for Plaintiff: Syed Choudoury, also present.
Defendant: Paul D. Spicer, present in pop per.
Parties settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Stipulation for Entry of Judgment in favor of Plaintiff Syed Choudoury and against Defendant Paul D. Spicer for possession of 374 5th St. #208, San Francisco, stayed until 9:00 A.M. June 30, 2005. No other persons claim a right to possession, each to bear own fees and costs
Parties agreed to terms in open court, matter is deemed settled and trial vacted.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-25-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: DAVID MENDEZ FOR PLAINTIFF SYED CHOUDOURY
DEFENDANT PAUL D SPICER ARRIVED LATE

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. TO PROCEED AS JURY TRIAL SINCE DEFENDANT DID APPEAR BUT WAS IN THE HALL WHEN THE CASE WAS CALLED.

COMMISSIONER:SUE KAPLAN; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; NOT REPORTED (218)
